summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of PixelCraft company website after UI redesign. All features working correctly - clean minimalist dark theme with gold (#C9A227) accent on pure black (#000) background. All pages render correctly, navigation works, mobile menu functional, contact form submission works (MOCKED).
passed_tests: Homepage loads with Hero section containing 'We build digital products that actually work.'
Hero section shows stats: 50+ Projects, 30+ Clients, 4+ Years
Navigation bar has all 6 links: Home, Services, Portfolio, About, Pricing, Contact
'Start a Project' CTA button in navbar works
Services section on homepage shows 6 service cards
Portfolio section on homepage shows 3 project cards with Unsplash images
Testimonials section shows 3 testimonial cards with 5-star ratings
CTA section with 'Start a Conversation' and 'Explore Our Work' buttons
Services page renders with 6 detailed service cards (Website Dev, Mobile Apps, Automation, AI Agents, UI/UX, Security)
Each service has 'Get a quote' link and feature list
Portfolio page renders with 5 project cards (CVEarity, SecurIT, AIText Humanizer, Mediconnect, ChessAI)
Portfolio images load correctly from Unsplash
About page shows stats (50+ Projects, 30+ Clients, 4 Team Members, 100% Satisfaction)
About page shows 4 values (Design-First, Passion for Craft, Built to Scale, Partners Not Vendors)
About page shows 4 team members with names and roles
About page has Story section
Pricing page shows 3 plans: Starter (INR 49,999), Professional (INR 1,49,999), Enterprise (Custom)
Professional plan highlighted as 'Most Popular'
Contact page shows contact form with all fields (First Name, Last Name, Email, Project Type, Budget, Message)
Contact page shows correct phone: +91 93912 79070
Contact page shows correct address: Tirupati, Andhra Pradesh, India
Contact form submission works (shows 'Message Sent!' success state)
Footer shows PIXELCRAFT branding
Footer shows correct phone: +91 93912 79070
Footer shows correct address: Tirupati, Andhra Pradesh
Footer has Services links (Website Development, Mobile Apps, Automation, AI Agents, UI/UX Design)
Footer has Company links (About Us, Portfolio, Pricing, Contact)
Footer has Connect links (Twitter, LinkedIn, GitHub)
Mobile menu toggle works on small viewport (390x844)
Mobile menu shows all 6 navigation links
Mobile menu has 'Start a Project' CTA
All data-testid attributes present on key elements
No broken images detected
Clean minimalist design with gold accent on black background
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Next.js Image component shows LCP warning - consider adding 'priority' prop to above-fold images in portfolio
Minor: images.domains config is deprecated - should migrate to images.remotePatterns

mocked_apis.contact_form_submission: Contact form uses setTimeout(1500ms) mock - no actual backend call

context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend features working correctly. UI redesign complete - removed glassmorphism/particles/glow effects. New clean minimalist dark theme with gold (#C9A227) accent. Contact form submission is MOCKED (setTimeout only). All pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing.
